description.stringValue:
NPTEL Online Certification in Python for Data Science, offered by IIT Madras! 🚀
Building robust, intelligent systems requires a strong foundation in data manipulation and analytical problem-solving. This 4-week course deepened my technical understanding of core Python libraries and data science methodologies. I am actively applying these foundational skills to optimize data handling in my computer vision and machine learning projects, such as my recent AI-based smart attendance system.

title.stringValue: NPTEL Online Certification in Python for Data Science

description.stringValue: Successfully completed the Software Tester Internship Program at Stackup Learning Hub! This experience has been a fantastic opportunity to develop my practical skills and dive deeper into software testing methodologies. A big thank you to the entire team at Stackup for their guidance and support throughout the program.

title.stringValue: VIRTUAL LAB in association with NIT, Surathkal

description.stringValue: Attended a one day online workshop on the topic 'VIRTUAL LAB' organized by Department of Computer Science & Engineering on 10th January 2025.

Successfully completed the ROBOWORX One Day Workshop organized by Srishti Campus! ⚙️

It was a brilliant experience diving into robotics and exploring new technologies at Technopark, Trivandrum. Always eager to learn, build, and understand how complex systems operate from the ground up.

Passionate developer focused on building scalable backends and integrating intelligent features using AI. Currently exploring DevOps to streamline deployments and build resilient, high-performance systems that solve real-world problems.

title.stringValue: Smart AI Based Attendance Monitoring System Using YOLO26

description.stringValue: An advanced, automated attendance tracking system leveraging YOLO object detection to accurately recognize and log individuals in real-time.

A highly interactive, stealth-themed web application designed as a next-generation Heads-Up Display (HUD) for CLI developers. Powered by Google Gemini AI, it acts as a cross-platform expert terminal assistant directly inside your browser.
Currently in development. Exploring how Generative AI can be leveraged to detect anomalies in power consumption.

title.stringValue: Electricity Theft and Overuse Detection using Generative AI

bio.stringValue: I am a passionate developer focusing on building robust, scalable applications and integrating intelligent features using machine learning. With a strong foundation in backend architecture and system design, I continuously strive to blend logic with real-world utility. Currently exploring computer vision and DevOps methodologies, I am architecting solutions using tools like Flask, YOLO, and FaceNet—including a recent highly accurate automated smart tracking system leveraging asynchronous task queues. I aim to create seamless, high-performance applications from development through deployment. When I am not coding, I am usually optimizing workflows or experimenting with new infrastructure tools to refine system reliability.
